ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: NOT( ISPICKVAL( Status__c , "Sent to customer") )&& (NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT( General_Feedback_Rate__c )))|| NOT(ISBLANK( Additional_Feedback_Notes__c ))) && NOT($Profile.Id='00eb0000000oBvcAAE')
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Feedback is available only after status changed to "Sent to customer".
